hero.subtitle: Manage screen time, filter harmful content, and receive reports directly via Zalo — just install on your child's device.

features.title: Every tool parents need, in one app
features.subtitle: Designed by education and security experts to help you guide your child in the digital age.
features.f1_desc: Set flexible screen time rules: up to 1 hour/day, auto-lock after 9 PM, pause during study hours.
features.f2_desc: Automatically block adult websites, age-inappropriate apps, and toxic content with specialized AI models.
features.f3_desc: Get daily and weekly breakdown reports: which apps were used, for how long, and frequency — all in clean charts.
features.f4_desc: Alert when child is too close to the screen, using in the dark, or needs screen-break reminders.
features.f5_desc: Text 'report' to Kibal Bot on Zalo to receive the latest stats instantly. Or schedule auto-reports (daily/weekly) in settings.
features.f6_desc: Parents don't need to install any app — just setup once on your child's device and everything runs automatically.

showcase.title: Beautiful Interface, Easy for the Family
showcase.subtitle: Two separate dashboards — for parents and children — designed specifically for each audience.
showcase.kid_desc: Soft colors, simple usage, encouraging healthy habits.
showcase.family_desc: Stay close to your child, anytime, anywhere.

guides.title: Get Started in 3 Easy Steps
guides.step1_desc: Install Kibal on your child's device — free on App Store & Google Play. Parents do NOT need to install anything.
guides.step2_desc: Login with parent's Zalo number to receive automated statistics right inside your familiar chat app.
guides.step3_desc: Configure hours and content filtering once on your child's device. All reports will be sent directly to your Zalo.

privacy.title: Kibal respects your family's privacy.
privacy.subtitle: We understand that your child's data is sacred. Therefore, all information is protected at the highest level — bank-grade security.
privacy.c1_desc: All child data is encrypted end-to-end, so no one can intercept or read it.
privacy.c2_desc: Kibal guarantees NEVER selling or sharing your child's data to third parties.
privacy.c3_desc: Complies with COPPA, GDPR-K, and global child online safety regulations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: What parents care about most before starting with Kibal.
faq.q1: Do parents need to install Kibal on their own devices?
faq.a1: No. Kibal is only installed on the child's device. Parents receive all statistics and alerts via Zalo message — no need to open another app.
faq.q2: When are the Zalo reports sent?
faq.a2: By default, Kibal sends daily summary reports at 9 PM and weekly reports on Sunday evenings. You can customize the hours or enable instant alerts.
faq.q3: Can a child uninstall Kibal by themselves?
faq.a3: No. Kibal has an anti-uninstall protection feature. Uninstalling requires parent's PIN code (authenticated via Zalo).
faq.q4: Which operating systems does Kibal support?
faq.a4: Kibal supports both iOS 14+ and Android 8+. The protection features and experience are fully synchronized across both platforms.
faq.q5: Can third parties read my child's data?
faq.a5: Absolutely not. All data is encrypted end-to-end and stored on domestic servers. Kibal never sells or shares data with advertising networks.
faq.a6: Yes. Kibal offers a free 14-day trial with all features, no credit card required. After that, you can choose a plan — cancel anytime.

cta_banner.subtitle: Download Kibal for free — no ads, no commitment.
